---

import MethodEndpoint from "@theme/ApiExplorer/MethodEndpoint";
import ParamsDetails from "@theme/ParamsDetails";

import OperationTabs from "@theme/OperationTabs";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Store a credential"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/api/credentials"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Encrypt and store a credential set. Credentials are AES-256-GCM
encrypted before storage. The plaintext values are never stored
and never returned in API responses.

A `credentialRef` is returned — use this when registering integrations.


<Heading
  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
>
  <Translate id="theme.openapi.request.title">Request</Translate>
</Heading>

  parameters={undefined}
>
  
</ParamsDetails>
